title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to platform reliability and Salesforce workflow management. OpsPal now automatically handles system maintenance tasks and prevents common setup errors that could interrupt your revenue operations. The platform also gained better safeguards for Salesforce flows and improved data consistency across all your connected systems.

entries.headline: Salesforce flows now work reliably with proper permissions
details: OpsPal automatically assigns the right permissions when setting up Salesforce flows, preventing workflow failures

entries.headline: Platform automatically cleans up old files and sessions
details: OpsPal now removes outdated system files and warns you if memory usage gets too high, keeping your workspace running smoothly

entries.headline: Salesforce setup now prevents common configuration errors
details: OpsPal detects when Dynamic Forms are active and prevents field conflicts
New record types are automatically assigned proper permissions
System routing no longer blocks your sessions unexpectedly

entries.headline: Platform automatically fixes missing dependencies at startup
details: OpsPal now detects and installs missing components in the background, showing you clear error messages if manual fixes are needed

entries.headline: Eliminated false error messages during platform startup
